category_sources: source_facts.description says lazydocker is a lazier way to manage everything Docker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives lazydocker; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Docker management; source_facts.executables lists the lazydocker CLI.
